data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the tiered rewards structure, specifically the conditions for rewards based on the number of referrals. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that the system tracks and rewards users according to the specified tiers (3 referrals = $10, 10 = $50, 25 = VIP status). The linked use case mentions a referral program but lacks concrete evidence of the tiered reward mechanics, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of tracking and rewarding based on the specified tiered structure.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
